fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/5.0/StructureDefinition/extension-Questionnaire.item.answerConstraint>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:condition [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), 'value')])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "n/a" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension:unit" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "unit" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Unit for numeric answer" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides a computable unit of measure associated with numeric questions to support subsequent computation on responses. This is for use on items of type integer and decimal, and it's purpose is to support converting the integer or decimal answer into a Quantity when extracting the data into a resource." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The human-readable unit is conveyed as a display element.  This element is for computation purposes." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;

fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/questionnaire-unit"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/questionnaire-unit>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A (MIF-level)" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension:itemPopulationContext" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "itemPopulationContext" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Establishes mapping context for a Questionnaire item" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Specifies a query or other expression that identifies the resource (or set of resources for a repeating item) that should be used to support the population of this Questionnaire or Questionnaire.item on initial population.  When populating the questionnaire, it will set the specified variable name to that resource repetition for use in processing items within the group." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-itemPopulationContext"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-itemPopulationContext>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension:itemVariable" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "itemVariable" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Variable for processing" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Variable specifying a logic to generate a variable for use in subsequent logic.  The name of the variable will be added to FHIRPath's context when processing descendants of the element that contains this extension as well as extensions within the same element." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Ordering of variable extension declarations is significant as variables declared in one repetition of this extension might be used in subsequent extension repetitions\n\nFor questionnaires, see additional guidance and examples in the [SDC implementation guide](http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/behavior.html#variable)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/variable"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/variable>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension:initialExpression" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "initialExpression" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Expression-determined initial value" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Initial value for a question answer as determined by an evaluated expression." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Initial value is only calculated at the time the QuestionnaireResponse is first generated.  If the expression returns coded data, it **SHALL* return the information as either code or Coding, not CodeableConcept.  If the expression returns elements of type 'code', when the user selects one or more candidates, the code will be matched against the allowed Codings (from answerValueSet, answerOptions, or answerExpression).  In this case, it is an error if there is more than one Coding with the same code." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-initialExpression"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-initialExpression>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension:candidateExpression" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "candidateExpression" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Expression for possible answers" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A FHIRPath or CQL expression, or FHIR Query that resolves to a list of candidate answers for the question item or that establishes context for a group item.  The user may select from among the candidates to choose answers for the question." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The results of the expression must correspond to the item type of the question the element appears on or must correspond to a resource, backbone element or complex data type for a group item.  Resources are considered a match for the Reference item type.  Quantity can be a match for decimal and integer items so long as a questionnaire-unit extension is present.  If the expression returns coded data, it **SHALL* return the information as either code or Coding, not CodeableConcept.  If the expression returns elements of type 'code', when the user selects one or more candidates, the code will be matched against the allowed Codings (from answerValueSet, answerOptions, or answerExpresssion).  In this case, it is an error if there is more than one Coding with the same code." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-candidateExpression"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-candidateExpression>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension:contextExpression" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "contextExpression" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Expression for information to guide answers" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A FHIR Query that resolves to one or more resources that can be displayed to the user to help provide context for answering a question. For example, if the question is \"Has the patient discussed this issue on any visits in the past year?\", the contextExpression might return the set of patient's encounters for the prior 12 month period to help jog the practitioner's memory." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-contextExpression"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-contextExpression>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension:itemHidden" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "itemHidden" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Don't display to user" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "If true, indicates that the extended item should not be displayed to the user." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "If an item is hidden, all descendant items are hidden as well.  See additional guidance and examples in the [SDC implementation guide](http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/rendering.html#hidden)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/questionnaire-hidden"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/questionnaire-hidden>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension:choiceColumn" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "choiceColumn" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Guide for rendering multi-column choices" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides guidelines for rendering multi-column choices.  I.e. when displaying a list of codes (for `choice` or `open-choice` items) or a list of resources (for `reference` items), this extension allows the drop-down to have multiple columns.  For codes, the author can pick additional code system properties to display - such as alternate display names strength or form for drug codes, etc.  For references, the author can choose particular columns from the resource (e.g. first name, last name, specialty, address)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Each repetition represents a column to display." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-choiceColumn"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-choiceColumn>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension:isSubject" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "isSubject" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Marks that this item identifies a different subject" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "If present and true, indicates that the item establishes a different subject for the group in a response." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The item type must be \"reference\" and there can only be one item with this extension in each group." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows the population process to leverage the fact that the subject for this group and descendants is distinct" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-isSubject"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnaire-isSubject>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.modifierExtension" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.modifierExtension" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element and that modifies the understanding of the element in which it is contained and/or the understanding of the containing element's descendants. Usually modifier elements provide negation or qualification. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension. Applications processing a resource are required to check for modifier extensions.\n\nModifier extensions SHALL NOT change the meaning of any elements on Resource or DomainResource (including cannot change the meaning of modifierExtension itself)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored.  This promotes interoperability by eliminating the need for implementers to prohibit the presence of extensions. For further information, see the [definition of modifier extensions](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extensibility.html#modifierExtension)." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "extensions" ] [ fhir:v "user content" ] [ fhir:v "modifiers" ] ) ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "BackboneElement.modifierExtension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "Modifier extensions are expected to modify the meaning or interpretation of the element that contains them" ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.linkId" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.linkId" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Unique id pour l'item du modèle" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "An identifier that is unique within the Questionnaire allowing linkage to the equivalent item in a QuestionnaireResponse resource." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This ''can'' be a meaningful identifier (e.g. a LOINC code) but is not intended to have any meaning.  GUIDs or sequential numbers are appropriate here." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "[QuestionnaireResponse](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/questionnaireresponse.html#) does not require omitted items to be included and may have some items that repeat, so linkage based on position alone is not sufficient." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.linkId" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "que-15" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Link ids must be 255 characters or less" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "$this.length() <= 255" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "string-length(@value) <= 255" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnairecommon"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-questionnairecommon>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "ihe-sdc" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./section_identifier" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".id" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.definition" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.definition" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Element concerné par la saisie" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "This element is a URI that refers to an [ElementDefinition](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/elementdefinition.html) that provides information about this item, including information that might otherwise be included in the instance of the Questionnaire resource. A detailed description of the construction of the URI is shown in Comments, below. If this element is present then the following element values MAY be derived from the Element Definition if the corresponding elements of this Questionnaire resource instance have no value:\n\n* code (ElementDefinition.code) \n* type (ElementDefinition.type) \n* required (ElementDefinition.min) \n* repeats (ElementDefinition.max) \n* maxLength (ElementDefinition.maxLength) \n* answerValueSet (ElementDefinition.binding)\n* options (ElementDefinition.binding)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The uri refers to an ElementDefinition in a [StructureDefinition](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/structuredefinition.html#) and always starts with the [canonical URL](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/references.html#canonical) for the target resource. When referring to a StructureDefinition, a fragment identifier is used to specify the element definition by its id [Element.id](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/element-definitions.html#Element.id). E.g. http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Observation#Observation.value[x]. In the absence of a fragment identifier, the first/root element definition in the target is the matching element definition." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "A common pattern is to define a set of data elements and then build multiple questionnaires for different circumstances to gather the data. This element provides traceability to the common definition and allows the content for the question to come from the underlying definition." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.definition" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "uri"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".outboundRelationship[typeCode=INST].target[classCode=OBS, moodCode=DEF]" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.code" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.code" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Corresponding concept for this item in a terminology" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A terminology code that corresponds to this group or question (e.g. a code from LOINC, which defines many questions and answers)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The value may come from the ElementDefinition referred to by .definition." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows linking of groups of questions to formal terminologies." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.code" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Coding"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:condition [ fhir:v "que-3" ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [ fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:string ;
fhir:v "QuestionnaireConcept"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Codes for questionnaires, groups and individual questions." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/questionnaire-questions"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/questionnaire-questions>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".code" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.prefix" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.prefix" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "E.g. \"1(a)\", \"2.5.3\"" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A short label for a particular group, question or set of display text within the questionnaire used for reference by the individual completing the questionnaire." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "These are generally unique within a questionnaire, though this is not guaranteed. Some questionnaires may have multiple questions with the same label with logic to control which gets exposed.  Typically, these won't be used for \"display\" items, though such use is not prohibited.  Systems SHOULD NOT generate their own prefixes if prefixes are defined for any items within a Questionnaire." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Separating the label from the question text allows improved rendering.  Also, instructions will often refer to specific prefixes, so there's a need for the questionnaire design to have control over what labels are used." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "label" ] ) ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.prefix" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;

fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "ihe-sdc" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./section_number/label" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Not supported" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.text" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.text" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Texte pour l'item" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The name of a section, the text of a question or text content for a display item." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "When using this element to represent the name of a section, use group type item and also make sure to limit the text element to a short string suitable for display as a section heading.  Group item instructions should be included as a display type item within the group." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.text" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".text" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.type" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.type" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Type de l'item group | display | boolean | decimal | integer | date | dateTime ..." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The type of questionnaire item this is - whether text for display, a grouping of other items or a particular type of data to be captured (string, integer, coded choice, etc.)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Time is handled using \"string\".  File is handled using Attachment.  (Content can be sent as a contained binary)." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Defines the format in which the user is to be prompted for the answer." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.type" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [ fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:string ;
fhir:v "QuestionnaireItemType"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "required" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Distinguishes groups from questions and display text and indicates data type for questions." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/item-type|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/item-type|4.0.1>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "ihe-sdc" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./*/datatype" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A - MIF rather than RIM level" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.enableWhen" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.enableWhen" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Item autorisé / disponible que sous condition" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A constraint indicating that this item should only be enabled (displayed/allow answers to be captured) when the specified condition is true." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "If multiple repetitions of this extension are present, the item should be enabled when the condition for *any* of the repetitions is true.  I.e. treat \"enableWhen\"s as being joined by an \"or\" clause.  This element is a modifier because if enableWhen is present for an item, \"required\" is ignored unless one of the enableWhen conditions is met. When an item is disabled, all of its descendants are disabled, regardless of what their own enableWhen logic might evaluate to." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows questionnaires to adapt based on answers to other questions. E.g. If physical gender is specified as a male, no need to capture pregnancy history.  Also allows conditional display of instructions or groups of questions." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.enableWhen" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "BackboneElement"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "que-7" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "If the operator is 'exists', the value must be a boolean" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "operator = 'exists' implies (answer is Boolean)" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "f:operator/@value != 'exists' or exists(f:answerBoolean)" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Questionnaire"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Questionnaire>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "If enableWhen is present and the condition evaluates to false, then the Questionnaire behaves as though the elements weren't actually present" ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element and that modifies the understanding of the element in which it is contained and/or the understanding of the containing element's descendants. Usually modifier elements provide negation or qualification. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance applied to the definition and use of extensions. Applications processing a resource are required to check for modifier extensions.\n\nModifier extensions SHALL NOT change the meaning of any elements on Resource or DomainResource (including cannot change the meaning of modifierExtension itself)." ] ;

fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored.  This promotes interoperability by eliminating the need for implementers to prohibit the presence of extensions. fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.enableWhen.question" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.enableWhen.question" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Question that determines whether item is enabled" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The linkId for the question whose answer (or lack of answer) governs whether this item is enabled." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "If multiple question occurrences are present for the same question (same linkId), then this refers to the nearest question occurrence reachable by tracing first the \"ancestor\" axis and then the \"preceding\" axis and then the \"following\" axis." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:strength [ fhir:v "required" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Controls how multiple enableWhen values are interpreted -  whether all or any must be true." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/questionnaire-enable-behavior|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/questionnaire-enable-behavior|4.0.1>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A - MIF rather than RIM level" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.required" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.required" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Champs requis" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "An indication, if true, that the item must be present in a \"completed\" QuestionnaireResponse.  If false, the item may be skipped when answering the questionnaire." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.required only has meaning for elements that are conditionally enabled with enableWhen if the condition evaluates to true.  If an item that contains other items is marked as required, that does not automatically make the contained elements required (though required groups must contain at least one child element). The value may come from the ElementDefinition referred to by .definition." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.required" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
fhir:meaningWhenMissing [ fhir:v "Items are generally assumed not to be required unless explicitly specified. Systems SHOULD always populate this value" ] ;
      ( fhir:condition [ fhir:v "que-6" ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [

fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "ihe-sdc" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./cardinality/minimum!=0" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A - MIF rather than RIM level" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.repeats" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.repeats" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Si l'item peut de répeter" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "An indication, if true, that a QuestionnaireResponse for this item may include multiple answers associated with a single instance of this item (for question-type items) or multiple repetitions of the item (for group-type items)" ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "If a question is marked as repeats=true, then multiple answers can be provided for the question in the corresponding QuestionnaireResponse.  When rendering the questionnaire, it is up to the rendering software whether to render the question text for each answer repetition (i.e. \"repeat the question\") or to simply allow entry/selection of multiple answers for the question (repeat the answers).  Which is most appropriate visually may depend on the type of answer as well as whether there are nested items.\n\nThe resulting QuestionnaireResponse will be populated the same way regardless of rendering - one 'question' item with multiple answer values.\n\n The value may come from the ElementDefinition referred to by .definition." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Items may be used to create set of (related) questions that can be repeated to give multiple answers to such a set." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.repeats" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
fhir:meaningWhenMissing [ fhir:v "Items are generally assumed not to repeat unless explicitly specified. Systems SHOULD always populate this value" ] ;
      ( fhir:condition [ fhir:v "que-6" ] ) ;

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.readOnly" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.readOnly" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "En lecture seule" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "An indication, when true, that the value cannot be changed by a human respondent to the Questionnaire." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The value of readOnly elements can be established by asserting  extensions for defaultValues, linkages that support pre-population and/or extensions that support calculation based on other answers." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows certain information to be phrased (and rendered) as a question and an answer, while keeping users from changing it.  May also be useful for preventing changes to pre-populated portions of a questionnaire, for calculated values, etc." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.readOnly" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.item.maxLength" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "No more than this many characters" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The maximum number of characters that are permitted in the answer to be considered a \"valid\" QuestionnaireResponse." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "For base64binary, reflects the number of characters representing the encoded data, not the number of bytes of the binary data. The value may come from the ElementDefinition referred to by .definition." ] ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Valeur(s) initiale(s)" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "One or more values that should be pre-populated in the answer when initially rendering the questionnaire for user input." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The user is allowed to change the value and override the default (unless marked as read-only). If the user doesn't change the value, then this initial value will be persisted when the QuestionnaireResponse is initially created.  Note that initial values can influence results.  The data type of initial[x] must agree with the item.type, and only repeating items can have more then one initial value." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "In some workflows, having defaults saves time." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.identifier" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.identifier" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Identifiant du modèle de saisie. Exemple MS-141" ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.version" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.version" ] ;

fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.name" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.name" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Nom utilisé par les systèmes pour référencer le modèle Exemple MS-141" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.title" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.title" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Titre du modèle. Exemple Unité d'accueil de jour, Equipe spécialisée Alzheimer (ESA), Unité d'Hébergement « traditionnelle » , en EHPAD Petite unité de vie (PUV)" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.status" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.status" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Statut du modèle" ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.subjectType" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.subjectType" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Type de la ressource qui alimente ce modèle : HealthcareService ou Organization ou Location" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.date" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.date" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Date du dernier changement" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.publisher" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.publisher" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Nom de l'éditeur du modèle: Etablissement ou personne" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.description" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.description" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Description du modèle de saisie" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.useContext" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.useContext" ] ;
fhir:slicing [
        ( fhir:discriminator [
fhir:type [ fhir:v "pattern" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "code" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Slicing pour définir les différents contextes d'usage du modèle afin de pouvoir catégoriser ces modèles de saisie par : catégorie d'EG (obligatoire), Spécialité ordinale (optionnel), profession (optionnel) et domaine (optionnel)" ] ;
fhir:ordered [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:rules [ fhir:v "open" ]       ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Contexte d'usage du modèle de saisie spécifiant pour quelles catégories d'EG ainsi que potentiellemnt la spécialité ordinale, la profession et ou le domaine de l'offre pour lesquels ce modèle est applicable" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Questionnaire.useContext" ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]     ] [

fhir:type [ fhir:v "type" ] ;
